sentence_reviews.text: Constraint, SAT, and SMT solvers search for assignments satisfying logical, arithmetic, bit-vector, temporal, or theory-specific formulas.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA constraint satisfaction and logical inference/search material; SMT-specific theory examples are synthesized.
sentence_reviews.notes: Constraint satisfaction and SAT-style assignment search are supported; bit-vector and temporal SMT details are broader than the cited source.

sentence_reviews.text: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Constraint propagation, logic & program execution, Discrete mathematics & logic.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
